settings.text: Clearpath was founded in 2010 by Daniel Reeves with a conviction that consulting should be measured by outcomes, not hours billed. After a decade at a global firm, he saw too many strategies that never left the slide deck.
Today, Clearpath is a team of senior practitioners who embed with client teams, own the implementation, and stay until the results are real. We work with fewer clients, more deeply.

settings.title: Founded in Boston
settings.description: Daniel Reeves launches Clearpath with a focus on strategy execution for mid-market companies.

settings.title: First $100M Engagement
settings.description: Secured a transformational engagement with a national healthcare network, establishing our reputation in operational turnarounds.

settings.title: Digital Practice Launched
settings.description: Expanded into digital transformation and data strategy, responding to growing client demand for technology-driven change.

settings.title: 200th Engagement
settings.description: Reached a milestone of 200 completed engagements across 15 industries, with 96% client retention.

settings.title: Outcome-Obsessed
settings.description: We define success by measurable results, not deliverables. Every engagement has clear metrics tied to real business impact.

settings.title: Client-First
settings.description: Your priorities are our priorities. We structure engagements around your timeline, your constraints, and your definition of success.

settings.title: Systems Thinking
settings.description: We look at the whole picture — strategy, operations, people, and technology — because the best solutions cross functional boundaries.

settings.title: Continuous Improvement
settings.description: We iterate, measure, and refine. The first answer is rarely the best answer, and we're not afraid to adjust course.

settings.name: Daniel Reeves
settings.bio: Former McKinsey engagement manager with 20+ years advising C-suites on growth strategy, M&A, and organizational transformation.

settings.name: Anika Patel
settings.bio: Led 50+ operational turnarounds across healthcare, manufacturing, and logistics. Known for delivering results under tight timelines.

settings.name: Thomas Brennan
settings.bio: Former CTO turned consultant. Bridges the gap between technology vision and practical implementation for mid-market enterprises.

settings.question: How are engagements structured?
settings.answer: Most engagements follow our four-phase model: Diagnose, Design, Deliver, Sustain. Typical duration is 3-9 months depending on scope. We work in defined sprints with clear milestones and regular check-ins.

settings.question: How long does a typical engagement last?
settings.answer: Rapid sprints run 2-4 weeks for focused diagnostics or strategy sessions. Full engagements typically run 3-6 months. Transformation programs can extend to 12 months with phased implementation.

settings.question: How do you price your services?
settings.answer: We offer fixed-fee engagements scoped to defined outcomes, as well as monthly retainers for ongoing advisory. We don't bill by the hour — our incentives are aligned with your results.

settings.question: How large is a typical project team?
settings.answer: We keep teams small and senior. A typical engagement has 2-3 Clearpath consultants working directly with your team. No junior analysts learning on your dime.
